company.name: Albina Alareeq
company.fullName: Albina Alareeq Contracting & General Maintenance LLC - S.P.C
company.tagline: Building the Future, Restoring the Present

home.heroTagline: Building the Future, Restoring the Present
home.aboutText: With over 15 years of excellence in the UAE construction industry, Al Binaa Al Areeg has established itself as a premier contracting company. We deliver world-class construction, renovation, and maintenance services with an unwavering commitment to quality, safety, and client satisfaction.
home.servicesSubtitle: Comprehensive contracting solutions for every need
home.projectsSubtitle: Excellence in every structure we build
home.whyTitle: Why Choose Al Binaa Al Areeg?
home.whySubtitle: Your trusted partner for all construction needs in the UAE
home.whyLicensedDesc: Fully licensed by UAE authorities with all necessary certifications and permits.
home.whyOnTimeDesc: We respect your timeline and deliver projects on schedule, every time.
home.whyExpertDesc: Our engineers, architects, and technicians bring decades of combined experience.
home.whyEndToEndDesc: From design to completion, we manage every aspect of your project.
home.ctaSubtitle: Contact us today for a free consultation and quote

about.missionText: To deliver exceptional construction and maintenance services that exceed client expectations, contribute to the development of Abu Dhabi, and uphold the highest standards of quality, safety, and professionalism.
about.visionText: To be the leading contracting company in the UAE, recognized for innovative solutions, sustainable practices, and transformative projects that shape the future of our nation's built environment.

generalConstruction.title: General Construction
generalConstruction.shortDesc: Full-scale commercial and residential construction projects built to the highest UAE standards.
generalConstruction.fullDesc: Our general construction division handles everything from concept to completion. We build commercial complexes, residential developments, government facilities, and industrial structures with precision and expertise.

renovation.title: Renovation & Fit-Out
renovation.shortDesc: Transform your spaces with our expert renovation and interior fit-out services.
renovation.fullDesc: We breathe new life into existing structures through comprehensive renovation and fit-out works, maintaining minimal disruption while delivering maximum transformation.

maintenance.title: General Maintenance
maintenance.shortDesc: Comprehensive facility maintenance to keep your properties in peak condition.
maintenance.fullDesc: Our maintenance division provides preventive, corrective, and emergency maintenance services for residential, commercial, and government properties across Abu Dhabi.

mep.title: MEP Works
mep.shortDesc: Expert mechanical, electrical, and plumbing installations for all building types.
mep.fullDesc: Our MEP division delivers complete mechanical, electrical, and plumbing solutions, ensuring every building system operates efficiently and safely.

civil.title: Civil Works & Infrastructure
civil.shortDesc: Large-scale civil engineering and infrastructure development across the UAE.
civil.fullDesc: We execute major civil engineering projects including road construction, utilities, earthworks, and public infrastructure, contributing to Abu Dhabi's rapid development.

projectManagement.title: Project Management
projectManagement.shortDesc: Professional project management ensuring on-time, on-budget delivery.
projectManagement.fullDesc: Our experienced project managers provide end-to-end oversight of construction projects, coordinating all stakeholders and resources to deliver successful outcomes.

projects.pageSubtitle: A portfolio of excellence across the UAE

contact.pageSubtitle: We'd love to hear from you
contact.formSuccess: Thank you! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
